commands.review_summary:
The PR updates QQBot channel send normalization and adapter tests so lower-layer errors or empty platform message receipts reject instead of returning an empty successful receipt.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +26. Total +32 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main stores QQBot lower-layer errors in meta and returns an empty successful receipt when no platform id exists. The PR body also reports before/after behavior from the adapter path, but I did not run a credentialed live QQBot send in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the compatibility semantics and normal merge/check gating.
